title: TUI session save loses messages on intermediate failures: save_session error ignored repeatedly
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
error-handling
## Location
src/tui/app.rs:568, 629, multiple call sites
## Violation
Every call to save_session swallows the Result with `let _ =`:

```rust
let _ = save_session(&self.chat_session);
```

This pattern appears at lines 568 (App::run exit), 629 (ResponseDone), 813, 818 (undo/redo), and others. A disk-full or permission-denied condition silently loses every chat message from this point forward — the user only discovers the data loss when they later try to /resume and the saved session is missing or stale.

The TUI is interactive and the session is the user's primary artifact. Failing to save is a high-importance event that deserves at least a user-visible notification.

## Mandated refactor
Either:
1. Promote save failures to a DisplayMessage that the user sees in the message list ("⚠ session save failed: disk full"), OR
2. Track save failures in self.last_save_error and render the error in the status bar so it persists until the next successful save.

The fire_notification_hook helper already exists for the API-error path — reuse it for save failures too.

## Filed from QA review dispatch
